auth.clientDescription: I need suppliers for my exhibitions and events
auth.supplierDescription: I provide services for exhibitions and events

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.body: We've sent you a verification link. Open it to activate your account. If you don't receive it within two minutes, check your spam folder.

home.title: App Exhibition
home.tagline: B2B platform for exhibition suppliers in Saudi Arabia
home.heroLead: Create one RFQ, receive offers from verified suppliers, compare with AI assistance, and keep your money in escrow until delivery.

icpTabs.clientsBody: Save weeks of supplier hunting. Post once, get comparable offers with AI assistance.
icpTabs.suppliersBody: RFQs matching your specializations and cities, delivered by email + notifications. 3% commission only.
icpTabs.organizersBody: Showcase your exhibition to thousands of companies sourcing suppliers before the event.

valueProps.title: Everything you need on one platform

items.verifiedBody: Every supplier passes a review (commercial registration, VAT, track record) before going live.
items.aiBody: We score every offer on 5 axes and summarize strengths and risks in Arabic.
items.escrowBody: 50% on kickoff + 50% after delivery. Your money sits with the platform until you accept.
items.panicBody: If a supplier stalls or a dispute opens, hit escalate and the ops team responds within 30 minutes.
items.feesBody: 5% total (2% from you + 3% from supplier). No subscription, no hidden fees.
items.speedBody: Average offer turnaround: 24 hours. Average kickoff: 5 days.

featuredSuppliers.title: Verified suppliers serving you now
featuredSuppliers.subtitle: A sample from hundreds of suppliers across 13 Saudi cities.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.t1Body: We used to lose two weeks picking a booth supplier. With the app, 5 offers arrived in one day and the AI comparison summarized the differences.
testimonials.t2Body: The cash escrow gave me peace of mind. We wired only 50%, the rest after we accepted delivery. Full transparency.
testimonials.t3Body: The escalation button saved us. There was a dispute over design details, and the ops team resolved it within hours.

ctaSection.title: Ready for your next exhibition?
ctaSection.body: Account creation is free. Your first RFQ is free. You only pay when a project succeeds.

siteFooter.tagline: B2B platform for exhibition suppliers in Saudi Arabia. Connecting buyers with the right suppliers, on time, safely.

forClients.title: One platform for every exhibition need
forClients.subtitle: Create one RFQ, receive offers from verified suppliers, compare with AI assistance, and keep your money in escrow until delivery.

scenarios.boothPain: Weeks chasing 3 quotes from scattered suppliers, prices all over the place, limited quality confidence.
scenarios.boothSolution: Post once, receive 5+ offers within 24 hours. AI compares and summarizes. Cash escrow.
scenarios.boothResult: Cut selection time by 60% + 15% average cost saving through transparent negotiation.
scenarios.giftsPain: Slow responses, low-quality samples, invoices without any guarantee.
scenarios.giftsSolution: Verified suppliers with track record, documented samples, escrow-protected payment.
scenarios.giftsResult: On-time delivery 96% + refund guarantee if delivery fails.
scenarios.eventPain: Too many vendors (catering, sound, lighting) hard to coordinate between them.
scenarios.eventSolution: Full-service suppliers handling all event components under one contract + unified timeline.
scenarios.eventResult: From 8 separate conversations down to one organized chat.

features.feeBody: 2% from you, 3% from the supplier. No subscriptions, no hidden fees.
features.escrowBody: Your money sits in escrow until you accept the delivery.
features.verifiedBody: Every supplier is reviewed before going live. Commercial registration + ratings.
features.aiBody: Strengths and risks summarized in under a minute.

forSuppliers.title: Reach companies looking for exactly what you offer
forSuppliers.subtitle: RFQs that match your specializations and cities, delivered by email and notifications. 3% commission, no subscription.

features.matchBody: We match by specialization and city. No wasted time.
features.guaranteedBody: Client pays into escrow upfront. No collection anxiety.
features.feeBody: Deducted from the project value. No subscription, no hidden fees.
features.portfolioBody: Your portfolio is showcased on the Discover page for everyone.
features.aiAssistBody: We automatically summarize your strengths so the client gets it fast.
features.fairBody: AI scores on 5 objective axes — company size or brand doesn't bias the result.
features.supportBody: Our team is available during business hours for any question.
features.growthBody: Client reviews build your reputation. Each successful project opens more doors.

forSuppliers.t1Body: Within 60 days we received 12 matching RFQs. Closed 4 contracts. The cash escrow is something we trust completely.
forSuppliers.t2Body: We used to waste time on RFQs that didn't fit. Now we only see RFQs in our cities and within our specializations.
forSuppliers.t3Body: The 3% is way less than traditional marketing costs. And payment is guaranteed. We expanded to two new cities.

howItWorks.title: How App Exhibition works
howItWorks.videoCaption: See how the platform works in 90 seconds
howItWorks.step1Title: Sign up and describe what you need
howItWorks.step1Body: Two minutes to register and write your RFQ. Pick the service, city, and budget.
howItWorks.step2Body: Matching suppliers get notified and submit offers with their prices and terms.
howItWorks.step3Body: We score each offer on 5 axes: price, delivery, completeness, professionalism, track record.
howItWorks.step4Body: Chats happen inside the platform. An Admin-escalation button is always one click away.
howItWorks.step5Body: Each side writes their own understanding. AI reconciles the differences. Both parties sign digitally.
howItWorks.step6Body: Wire 50% to escrow. Admin confirms. Final release happens after delivery and acceptance.
howItWorks.step7Body: After delivery you accept the work, the remaining 50% is released to the supplier, and you leave a review that helps future clients.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions. One commission, only on projects that successfully complete on the platform.
pricing.clientBody: Of the project value, added at the initial deposit.
pricing.supplierBody: Of the project value, deducted from the final payment.
pricing.footnoteOutro: . VAT of 15% applies to the commission only (not to the project value itself).

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Building the bridge between companies and suppliers in the Saudi exhibition market.
about.missionBody: Cut supplier discovery from weeks to hours, and protect both sides with cash escrow and transparent governance. Our goal: every exhibition delivers its commercial outcome without worrying about collection or quality.
about.visionBody: To be the trusted infrastructure for every exhibition and event service across the Gulf, starting from Saudi Arabia.
about.value1Body: Every fee, every rating, every decision — documented and visible to both sides.
about.value2Body: We evaluate suppliers on objective metrics. Company size or brand doesn't affect the result.
about.value3Body: Cash escrow, governance, ops team — nobody loses money on our platform.
about.value4Body: We respect our customers' time. RFQs within 24 hours. Responses within 2 hours.
about.team1Bio: 12+ years in the Saudi exhibition industry. Previously worked with top exhibition organizers.
about.team2Bio: 10+ years building B2B platforms. Former software engineer at a global tech company.
about.team3Bio: 8+ years in project and operations management. Background in supply-chain execution.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions, partnerships, or support — we reply during business hours.
contact.formNotice: Demo contact form — messages are not stored yet. For urgent matters, use the email above.

suppliersDirectory.title: Browse verified suppliers
suppliersDirectory.subtitle: Public preview — to request a quote, create a client account.
suppliersDirectory.loginPrompt: To contact this supplier and request a quote, create a client account.

exhibitions.title: Upcoming exhibitions
exhibitions.subtitle: Notable exhibitions across Saudi Arabia and the region. Start preparing your next exhibition early.
exhibitions.ctaPlan: Request a quote for this exhibition

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Guides, articles, and case studies for exhibition organizers and suppliers.

legal.termsLead: This is a placeholder. Replaced with final legal text reviewed by counsel before commercial launch.
legal.privacyLead: This is a placeholder. Replaced with final legal text reviewed by counsel before commercial launch.
legal.section1Body: By using the platform, you agree to these terms.
legal.section2Body: Every user is responsible for providing accurate information and keeping their credentials confidential.
legal.section3Body: A 5% commission (2% from the client + 3% from the supplier) applies to each project successfully completed on the platform.
legal.section4Body: Funds are paid into the platform's escrow account. Releases follow the rules of the signed agreement.
legal.section5Body: In case of dispute, the platform's operations team mediates as a neutral party. Final decisions are subject to the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
legal.privacy1Body: Email, name, phone number, company name, commercial registration, VAT, and supplier verification documents.
legal.privacy2Body: To deliver platform services, match clients with suppliers, operational communication, and regulatory compliance.
legal.privacy3Body: We do not share your data except with infrastructure providers (Supabase, Resend) for specific operational purposes.
legal.privacy4Body: You may access your data, modify it, or delete your account at any time.

notFound.body: Page not found. It may have been moved or deleted.
